title: Token Economy Calibration Hardening
summary: The token-economy-calibration-hardening Feature hardens the shipped prototype calibration harness under tests/compliance/context-usage/ without expanding the 2×2 matrix or harness root. The pass tightens task-high prompts and allowlists, normalizes temp-sandbox paths in analyzer findings, raises default overhead…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
